channel.title: Daily News (Personal Briefing)
channel.description: A personal morning news briefing covering AI, marketing, higher education, Canadian policy, BC local news, and global business.
channel.itunes:author: Daily News

item.title: Daily News for Monday, May 4, 2026
item.description: Today's dominant thread is geopolitical risk bleeding into economic reality: the U.S. military's move to force the Strait of Hormuz open is the kind of low-probability, high-consequence event that reshapes energy prices, supply chains, and business sentiment overnight — and Canad...
